As for $LPK: Maybe $3B-$5B seems reasonable when they fully volume ramp if I had to guess. 

Feels more asymmetrical to me personally since it's just a waiting game and they have the customers for glass substrates. 

Small machine supplier chokepoints usually cap out from TAM

That’s for you to decide.

But just throwing this out there:

If $AAOI hits projections, that’s over 800%+ Y/Y growth, and $5.6B revenue annualized off $12.8B MC.

My guess is that the $471m/month will keep going up as demand seems to scale exponentially into 2028.

I’d expect

RT @seclink: 如果有朋友最近在找工作，可以私信我聊聊看。
我这边收录了蛮多正在招人的大厂岗位的，也许有帮助。
另外，阿里园区隔壁的生态园，
蛮多公司也有新岗位放出来，
从阿里离职后，若能加入另一家阿里前同事成立的公司，
融入氛围和认同感会好一点，相互信任也会多一些。

I'm working on a community zine "Gallery of the Future". To take part:

1. Submit your work (link in comments)
2. Repost this 
3. Collaborate with others 
 
The link is to Firefly Boards, free tool, to generate 5 images and 2 videos daily with different AI models 

AllOnBoards https://t.co/XxCmap58Io

How to participate: 

1. Submit your work here. You can add existing work or generate it right there (for free if you don't have a subscription). 

https://t.co/vzjHjGasyg

Others can collaborate with your work, so you need to be okay with others remixing your work with AI

So cool to see the zine is coming alive in real time. 
@GlennHasABeard is working on his art right now. https://t.co/2OoD49tNOo
